Title: Fingerprint Wedding Band, His and Hers Couples Ring, Mens Tungsten Personalized Engraved Promise Anniversary Ring
Description:
Men's Wedding Band with & Symbol Engraved Two Fingerprint Couples Ring Tungsten Carbide Wedding Band                                                                  



•••Ordering Instructions•••
1. Select size 
2. Add to cart
3. Enter Personalization in the notes upon checkout or use the "Contact Shop Owner" or "Ask A Question" to send us a message.

•••Outside Engraving••• (Custom Engraving is Allowed)
1. Name, Logo or Fingerprint 
2. Code for Font Symbol you would like to engrave.

•••Inside Engraving••• (Custom Engraving is Allowed)
1. Name, Logo or Fingerprint 
2. Code for Symbol you would like to engrave.

•••How to Get Your Fingerprint••• 
You need the following: 
1.  Post It or Some Type of Bright Paper
2.  Pencil 
3. Clear Tape
4. Last but not least some Fingers :)

Instructions:
1.  First, you want to draw on the post-it or paper until the small surface is dark.
2. Then rub the finger you want to "print" hard on the post-it until its all black.
3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post-it or paper. 

If you need further instructions please contact us.
